input.question: How many scholarships have been paid vs not yet paid?

payload.question: How many scholarships have been paid vs not yet paid?

output.sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN paid_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Paid' END AS payment_state,
    COUNT(*) AS scholarship_count
  FROM scholarships
  GROUP BY CASE WHEN paid_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Paid' END
)
SELECT
  payment_state,
  scholarship_count
FROM counts
ORDER BY scholarship_count DESC;

visualization.description: Number of scholarships that have been paid vs not yet paid.
visualization.title: Scholarships: Paid vs Not Paid

payload.sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN paid_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Paid' END AS payment_state,
    COUNT(*) AS scholarship_count
  FROM scholarships
  GROUP BY CASE WHEN paid_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Paid' END
)
SELECT
  payment_state,
  scholarship_count
FROM counts
ORDER BY scholarship_count DESC;
